MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Spencer J. Thomas as Trustee of the Thomas Family is present. Represented by Charles Spencer.
Attorney Cindy Lee appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Charles Lennon is present.
Attorney Colleen Shaw representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed and Judgment filed.
The trial date of APR-23-2012 is vacated.
